summary: App project including magnetometer support and UI theming (dark theme).

existing_features.title: Add a complete magnetometer calibration workflow in the IMU dashboard so users can calibrate the magnetometer from the UI and have the calibration applied to live magnetometer values and MARG orientation updates.
Apply a dark theme layout across the app (always-on dark styling) and ensure all major layout surfaces and components consistently use dark theme tokens.

new_feature_requests.summary: Apply a dark theme layout for the app.

projectName: Add magnetometer calibration workflow and apply dark theme layout
